_comment: LIBERO eval results for lerobot/pi05_libero_finetuned_v044 (π0.5). Status: pending local verification. Numbers will be filled in after a reproduction run using lerobot-eval. Do NOT add numbers without a locally-verified eval run or a precise paper citation. Note: π0.5 weights are non-commercial — ensure OPENRAL_ALLOW_NONCOMMERCIAL=1 is set before running evals on restricted infrastructure.

source.paper: π0: A Vision-Language-Action Flow Model for General Robot Control
source.reproduction_planned: Pending — requires checkpoint inspection for camera/state spec before running lerobot-eval.

reproduction_cli.description: Re-run this benchmark inside the OpenRAL repo. ADR-0009 PR D: openral benchmark run is the canonical producer of RSkillEvalResult JSONs with reproduced_locally=true.
reproduction_cli.status: in-tree (libero_spatial); pi05 is ~8 h per LIBERO suite on A100 so paper numbers stay until a full repro run lands
notes: The 'results' block on this file is still the paper snapshot (reproduced_locally=false); re-running the command above and overwriting the file with its output flips that flag.
π0.5 uses flow-matching inference; confirm --policy.flow_matching_steps is set appropriately.
Weights are non-commercial — ensure OPENRAL_ALLOW_NONCOMMERCIAL=1 before running evals.

benchmark.name: LIBERO
benchmark.protocol: 10 trials per task, binary success, multi-task training

results.note: Fill in after running lerobot-eval with the π0.5 checkpoint, or after extracting values from an upstream publication with exact table reference.
